title: Interval Coalescer
topic: Fix and extend an interval coalescer with edge-case tests.
prompt: Fix and extend an interval coalescer. It should normalize reversed endpoints, reject invalid numbers, preserve deterministic ordering, merge overlapping intervals, optionally merge touching intervals, and handle empty and single-item inputs. Add edge-case tests for negative ranges, duplicates, touching ranges, reversed endpoints, and invalid values.
successCriteria: Input order does not affect output.
